allow: Bash(echo "SELECT ID, PATH, PARENT_ID, IS_FULLY_SCORED, CREATED_AT, IS_KEYWORDS_PROCESSED FROM FOLDERS WHERE ID > 692 ORDER BY ID;")
Bash(echo "SELECT ID, INPUT_PATH, STATUS, CREATED_AT, COMPLETED_AT, PHASE_ID, JOB_TYPE FROM JOBS WHERE ID > 243 ORDER BY ID;")
Bash(echo "SELECT FIRST 5 ID, FILE_NAME, FOLDER_ID, JOB_ID, SCORE_GENERAL, SCORE_TECHNICAL, SCORE_AESTHETIC, RATING, CREATED_AT FROM IMAGES WHERE ID > 49584 ORDER BY ID;")
Bash(echo "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS SCORED, COUNT\(SCORE_GENERAL\) AS HAS_SCORE FROM IMAGES WHERE ID > 49584;")
Bash(echo "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS CNT FROM STACK_CACHE WHERE ID > \(SELECT MAX\(ID\) - 25 FROM STACK_CACHE\);")
Bash(echo "SELECT ID, TRIM\(PATH\), PARENT_ID, IS_FULLY_SCORED, CREATED_AT, IS_KEYWORDS_PROCESSED FROM FOLDERS WHERE ID > 692 ORDER BY ID;")
Bash(echo "SET MAXROWS 50; SELECT ID, CAST\(TRIM\(PATH\) AS VARCHAR\(200\)\) AS PATH, PARENT_ID, IS_FULLY_SCORED, IS_KEYWORDS_PROCESSED FROM FOLDERS WHERE ID > 692 ORDER BY ID;")
